backend/main.mo: Main Motoko actor for the Higgins Music Hub backend, defining data types and storage for memberships, publishing works, releases, recording projects, and artist development entities, along with change history tracking and cross-linking between entities.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report documenting that the rollout/onboarding wizard's 'Part 5' frontend canister upgrade step was split into two distinct sub-steps (5a and 5b), each with its own screen, title, description, and confirmation prompt.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: Summarizes all key frontend source files including React Query hooks, related-records components, detail pages for each entity type, and utility hooks, describing their roles and notable fixes applied during the upgrade-hardening rollout.
frontend/index.css: Global stylesheet that imports Tailwind directives and defines CSS custom properties for light and dark theme design tokens (colors, radius, sidebar, charts).
frontend/index.html: Minimal HTML entry point for the Higgins Music app that mounts the React root div and loads the main TypeScript module.
frontend/ROLL_OUT_21_7_EXECUTION_LOG.md: Execution log for Rollout 21.7 (Step 9.5) capturing timestamped evidence of TypeScript compilation, production build, backend Motoko compilation, canister upgrade, and post-upgrade verification steps.
frontend/ROLL_OUT_21_7_STEP_9_5_ARTIFACT: Companion artifact document for the Rollout 21.7 execution log, intended to store verbatim command outputs and build logs that are too long to include inline in the main log.
frontend/ROLLOUT_STEPS.md: Single source of truth document listing completed and remaining rollout steps for the Higgins Music Hub, with detailed checklists, acceptance criteria, and evidence fields for Steps 10A (pre-deployment checks) and 10B (backend canister upgrade on mainnet).
frontend/SMOKE_TEST_21_1_21_2.md: Post-upgrade smoke test checklist for Rollout 21.1–21.2, covering landing page load, authentication, all five portal detail routes, Edit Links dialogs, and both admin and non-admin member roles.
frontend/SMOKE_TEST_21_3_21_4.md: Post-upgrade smoke test checklist for Rollout 21.3–21.4, verifying frontend upgrade resilience across all five detail routes and Edit Links dialogs for both admin and non-admin approved member roles.
frontend/SMOKE_TEST_21_5_21_6.md: Post-upgrade smoke test checklist for rollout 21.5–21.6, covering landing page load, authentication, all five portal detail routes, and Edit Links dialogs for both admin and non-admin approved member roles.
frontend/SMOKE_TEST_21_7_SESSION_LOG.md: Structured session log template for the rollout 21.7 smoke test, capturing test user principals, entity IDs, console output, and per-role pass/fail outcomes during execution.
frontend/SMOKE_TEST_21_7.md: Post-upgrade smoke test checklist for rollout 21.7, verifying the same five detail routes, Edit Links dialogs, and AuthGate/ApprovalGate behavior for both admin and non-admin roles, with a reference to a companion session log file.
frontend/SMOKE_TEST_STEP_10_MAINNET.md: Comprehensive mainnet smoke test checklist organized into three sections (10A pre-deployment, 10B backend upgrade, 10C frontend upgrade), verifying build, identity, canister status, and full application functionality for both admin and non-admin roles.
frontend/SMOKE_TEST_STEP_10C_MAINNET.md: Post-upgrade verification checklist for the frontend canister deployment on ICP mainnet (Step 10C), covering landing page, authentication, all five portal routes, Edit Links dialog, and AuthGate/ApprovalGate for both roles.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Defines the full TanStack Router route tree and React Query client setup for the app, mapping all portal routes (memberships, publishing, releases, recordings, artists, admin) with AuthGate protection.
frontend/src/components/admin/PortalAudi: Admin-only component that displays a grouped, prioritized summary of incomplete or empty portal sections using audit findings data, rendered as cards with badge indicators.
frontend/src/components/auth/AccessDenie: Simple presentational component that renders a centered 'Access Denied' message with a shield icon for unauthorized page access.
frontend/src/components/auth/ApprovalGat: Gate component that checks user approval status and either renders children (for admins/approved users) or shows a restricted access screen with an approval status banner.
frontend/src/components/auth/ApprovalSta: Alert banner shown to unapproved users that displays their pending membership status and provides a button to submit an approval request to admins.
frontend/src/components/auth/AuthGate.ts: Authentication guard component that redirects unauthenticated users to the landing page and shows a loading spinner while Internet Identity initializes or login is in progress.
frontend/src/components/auth/LoginButton: Toggle button component that handles Internet Identity login and logout, clearing the React Query cache on sign-out and displaying appropriate loading/authenticated states.
frontend/src/components/auth/ProfileSetu: Modal dialog that prompts newly authenticated users to complete their profile (name, email, bio) before using the app. It shows only when the user is authenticated but has no saved profile.
frontend/src/components/bulk/BulkDeleteC: Alert dialog that asks the user to confirm bulk deletion of a given count of entities, showing a loading spinner while the delete is pending.
frontend/src/components/dashboard/Analyt: Reusable bar chart card component built on Recharts that supports both horizontal and vertical orientations, with a custom tooltip and cycling chart colors.
Reusable donut/pie chart card component built on Recharts that displays percentage labels, a custom tooltip with percentage breakdown, and a legend.
frontend/src/components/dashboard/StatCa: Simple stat card that displays a title, numeric value (supporting bigint), an icon, and an optional description with a subtle hover animation.
frontend/src/components/feedback/AccessD: Full-page centered card shown when a user lacks permission to access an area, with a configurable message and a contact-admin note.
frontend/src/components/feedback/EmptySt: Centered empty-state UI with an optional icon, title, description, and an optional action button for when a list or section has no data.
frontend/src/components/feedback/ErrorBa: Destructive alert banner that displays an error title and message, converting common backend error strings into user-friendly text.
frontend/src/components/feedback/Loading: Full-screen centered skeleton placeholder shown while content is loading.
frontend/src/components/feedback/Section: Dashed-border placeholder card used during portal audits to mark unbuilt sections, styled by priority level (high/medium/low) with an icon and badge.
frontend/src/components/history/ChangeHi: Card panel that fetches and renders a timeline of change-history events for a given record, showing operation type badges, timestamps, and truncated principal IDs.
frontend/src/components/layout/BrandHead: Sticky top header with the Higgins Music logo and name that navigates to the home route on click, with an optional login button.
frontend/src/components/layout/PortalLay: Defines the main portal layout with a responsive sidebar navigation, handling route-based active states, admin-only nav items, and logout functionality.
frontend/src/components/related/EditLink: A simple button component that triggers an 'Edit Links' action with an optional disabled state.
frontend/src/components/related/EditRela: A dialog component for editing linked related records (memberships, artists, works, releases, projects) with multi-select lists, loading/error states, and a save callback.
frontend/src/components/related/MultiSel: A filterable, scrollable checkbox list component for selecting multiple entities by ID from a labeled set of options.
frontend/src/components/related/relatedR: Provides utility functions to determine if the current user can edit a record based on principal ownership or admin status, with defensive handling for missing values.
frontend/src/components/related/RelatedR: Displays linked related records (memberships, artists, works, releases, projects) as clickable badges, resolving IDs to labels using caller entity data.
frontend/src/components/table/SortableTa: A table header cell component that renders a sortable column with directional arrow icons indicating the current sort state.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: A hook that creates and caches an authenticated or anonymous backend actor using the current identity, invalidating dependent queries when the actor changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useCurrentUser.ts: A hook that fetches and exposes the current user's role and approval status from the backend actor, deriving convenience flags like isAdmin and isApproved.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides a React context and hook for Internet Identity authentication on ICP, managing login/logout state, identity persistence, and AuthClient creation with configurable options.
frontend/src/hooks/useLinkableEntityOpti: Returns formatted dropdown options for linkable entities (memberships, artists, works, releases, projects), fetching all records for admins or only caller-owned records for regular users.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Defines React Query hooks for all backend canister interactions including user profiles, roles, memberships, publishing works, releases, recording projects, and artist development entities.
frontend/src/hooks/useRolloutWizard.ts: Manages state for a multi-step deployment rollout wizard, defining the steps, confirmation gates, action items, and acceptance criteria for mainnet ICP canister deployments.
frontend/src/hooks/useTableSort.ts: Generic hook that provides sortable table functionality with support for ascending/descending sort, nested field access via dot notation, and comparison of strings, numbers, bigints, and arrays.
frontend/src/index.css: Global Tailwind CSS stylesheet defining a warm neutral color palette via CSS custom properties for both light and dark modes, targeting a music industry aesthetic.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that mounts the React app with React Query and Internet Identity providers wrapping the root App component.
frontend/src/pages/LandingPage.tsx: Public landing page displaying a hero section, services grid (Publishing, Label Management, Recordings, Artist Development), and co-operative membership info, with a sign-in button that redirects authenticated users to the portal.
frontend/src/pages/portal/admin/AdminBoo: Informational admin page explaining how to bootstrap the first administrator account by appending a secret token to the URL hash before signing in with Internet Identity.
frontend/src/pages/portal/admin/AdminDas: Admin-only dashboard displaying platform-wide stat cards (memberships, works, releases, etc.) and analytics charts (bar and pie) for membership status, release types, and project status, with loading skeletons and error handling.
frontend/src/pages/portal/admin/RoleAssi: Admin page listing all known users in a table and allowing role changes (Admin, Member, Guest) via a dropdown select, with an informational alert clarifying that authentication does not automatically grant admin access.
frontend/src/pages/portal/admin/RolloutC: Reusable alert dialog component that requires the user to check a confirmation checkbox before enabling the confirm button, used to gate destructive or significant rollout actions.
frontend/src/pages/portal/admin/RolloutW: Admin-only multi-step wizard page for guiding deployment of Higgins Music Hub to ICP mainnet, with step progress sidebar, confirmation dialogs, and reset functionality.
frontend/src/pages/portal/artists/Artist: Detail view for a single artist development entry, supporting inline editing of goals/plans/milestones, related record linking, and permission-based edit access.
List page for artist development entries with create, bulk delete, duplicate, and sortable table features, scoped by admin or caller role.
frontend/src/pages/portal/label/ReleaseD: Detail view for a single release record, supporting inline editing of title, type, tracklist, key dates, and workflow checklist, plus related entity linking and change history.
frontend/src/pages/portal/label/Releases: List page for music releases with create, bulk delete, duplicate, and sortable table features, scoped by admin or caller role.
frontend/src/pages/portal/memberships/Me: Detail page for a single membership record, supporting inline editing of name, email, and status, with admin/owner permission checks and related entity link management via dialogs.
List page for memberships showing a sortable table with bulk delete, duplicate, and create-new-membership dialog functionality, with admin vs. caller-scoped data loading.
frontend/src/pages/portal/PortalHome.tsx: Authenticated portal home page showing a personalized welcome message and a grid of navigation cards for each portal section, filtering out admin-only cards based on the current user's role.
frontend/src/pages/portal/publishing/Pub: Detail page for a single publishing work, allowing inline editing of title, registration status, contributors, ownership splits, and notes, with permission checks and related entity linking.
List page for publishing works with a sortable table, bulk delete, duplicate, and a create dialog supporting title, registration status, contributors, ISWC, and ISRC fields.
frontend/src/pages/portal/recordings/Rec: Detail page for a recording project, supporting inline editing of title, participants, session date, status, and notes, with owner/admin permission checks and related entity link management.
React page component for listing, creating, duplicating, and bulk-deleting recording projects, with sortable table display and role-based data fetching (admin vs. caller).
frontend/src/types/entities.ts: TypeScript type definitions for core domain entities (PublishingWork, Release, RecordingProject, ArtistDevelopment, CallerEntities) and the ProjectStatus enum mirroring backend Motoko variants.
frontend/src/types/rollout.ts: TypeScript interfaces defining the shape of a rollout wizard step (RolloutStep) and the overall wizard state (RolloutWizardState) including confirmations and step tracking.
frontend/src/utils/arrays.ts: Utility functions for safe array handling (normalizeToArray, normalizeArrays, safeArrayLength, isNonEmptyArray) designed for upgrade resilience when backend data may have undefined or null array fields.
frontend/src/utils/portalAudit.ts: Centralized audit findings catalog listing missing or incomplete features across portal sections (Memberships, Publishing Works, etc.) with priority levels, used by placeholder components and the admin dashboard.
frontend/src/utils/urlParams.ts: Utility functions for extracting, persisting, and clearing URL parameters from both query strings and hash-based routing, with sessionStorage fallback support.
frontend/src/utils/validation.ts: Validation utility for ownership splits, checking that the array is non-empty and that percentages sum to a valid range (0–100%).
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration extending the default theme with custom fonts, OKLCH-based color tokens, border radii, box shadows, accordion animations, and plugins for typography, container queries, and animate.
frontend/UPGRADE_LINKING_VERIFICATION_RE: Manual QA checklist document for smoke-testing upgrade-safe related-record linking across five entity detail pages, covering build status, auth flow, portal routes, and Edit Links dialog for both admin and non-admin users across multiple rollout phases.
frontend/UPGRADE_LINKING_VERIFICATION.md: Manual QA checklist for verifying post-upgrade related-record linking via the Edit Links dialog across all five portal detail routes, for both admin and non-admin approved member roles, including persistence checks after page refresh.
project_state.json: Project state metadata file for the Higgins Music Hub, recording schema version, existing features, and a completed feature request to split the rollout wizard's Part 5 into two sub-steps (5a and 5b).
